completion_summary: Ported 5 source files plus created Context.lean (1,649 lines total) from BimodalLogic to Cslib. All definitions, theorems, and proofs compile with zero sorries, zero vacuous definitions, and zero new axioms. Key adaptations: Atom parametrization, variable naming (F -> ℱ due to scoped notation), and Until/Since semantics swap to match cslib's standard convention.
